modules.module_title: Sharir Rachna aur Kriya Vigyan ke Mool Siddhant

questions.question: Ek Weight Management & Fitness Advisor ka primary role kya hai?

options.A: Clients ko personalized fitness aur diet plans develop karne mein help karna.
options.B: Clients ke liye medicines prescribe karna.
options.C: Sirf gym equipment operate karna sikhana.

questions.explanation: Advisor ka primary role clients ko unke fitness aur weight management goals achieve karne mein guide aur support karna hai, jismein personalized plans banana shamil hai.

questions.question: BMI ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Basal Metabolic Indicator

questions.explanation: BMI ka full form Body Mass Index hai, jo height aur weight ke base par body fat ka estimate lagata hai.

questions.question: Healthy weight loss ka recommended rate per week kitna hota hai?

options.B: 2 se 3 kg

questions.explanation: Healthy aur sustainable weight loss ke liye, 0.5 se 1 kg per week ka target recommend kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Sedentary lifestyle ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Bahut kam physical activity wala lifestyle

questions.explanation: Sedentary lifestyle ka matlab hai jahan physical activity bahut kam hoti hai, jisse health risks badh sakte hain.

questions.question: Weight management mein diet ke saath exercise kyu important hai?

options.A: Sirf diet se weight loss nahi hota.
options.B: Exercise muscles build karti hai aur metabolism boost karti hai.
options.C: Exercise se bhook kam lagti hai.
options.D: Exercise sirf mood improve karti hai.

questions.explanation: Exercise muscles build karti hai, jo resting metabolism ko boost karta hai, aur overall calorie expenditure badhata hai, jisse weight management mein help milti hai.

questions.question: Obesity ko define karne ke liye kis BMI range ka use kiya jata hai?
questions.explanation: BMI 30 ya usse zyada hone par ek individual ko obese classify kiya jata hai, jo kai health risks se associated hai.

questions.question: Ek successful weight management plan mein kya shamil hona chahiye?

options.B: Balanced nutrition, regular physical activity aur lifestyle changes.
options.D: Har din sirf ek meal khana.

questions.explanation: Successful weight management mein balanced diet, regular exercise aur sustainable lifestyle changes shamil hote hain.

questions.question: Metabolism kya hai?

options.A: Body ka food ko energy mein convert karne ka process.
options.B: Body ka fat store karne ka process.
options.C: Body ka water retain karne ka process.
options.D: Body ka blood circulate karne ka process.

questions.explanation: Metabolism woh process hai jismein body food aur drinks ko energy mein convert karti hai, jo body functions ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Weight management mein 'calorie deficit' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Jitni calories consume ki jaati hain, utni hi burn ki jaati hain.
options.B: Jitni calories consume ki jaati hain, usse kam burn ki jaati hain.
options.C: Jitni calories consume ki jaati hain, usse zyada burn ki jaati hain.

questions.explanation: Weight loss ke liye calorie deficit zaroori hai, jiska matlab hai ki aap jitni calories consume kar rahe hain, usse zyada burn kar rahe hain.

questions.question: Ek fitness advisor ko client ki privacy ke liye kaun sa ethical principle follow karna chahiye?

options.A: Client ki personal information sabhi ke saath share karna.
options.B: Client ki information ko confidential rakhna.
options.C: Client ki permission ke bina information use karna.
options.D: Sirf physical health information confidential rakhna.

questions.explanation: Ek advisor ko client ki personal aur health information ko confidential rakhna chahiye, jo professional ethics ka hissa hai.

questions.question: Holistic approach to weight management mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Physical, mental aur emotional well-being.

questions.explanation: Holistic approach mein weight management ko ek comprehensive tareeke se dekha jata hai, jismein physical health ke saath-saath mental aur emotional well-being bhi shamil hota hai.

questions.question: Long-term weight maintenance ke liye sabse important factor kya hai?

options.B: Sustainable lifestyle changes adopt karna.
options.C: Har hafte naye supplements try karna.
options.D: Sirf short-term goals par focus karna.

questions.explanation: Long-term weight maintenance ke liye sustainable lifestyle changes (jaise healthy eating habits aur regular exercise) adopt karna sabse important hai.

questions.question: Weight Management Advisor ko kis tarah ki education aur certification ki zaroorat hoti hai?

options.B: Specialized course in nutrition aur fitness, aur relevant certification.

questions.explanation: Ek professional Weight Management Advisor ko nutrition aur fitness mein specialized knowledge aur recognized certification ki zaroorat hoti hai.

questions.question: Client ke liye realistic goals set karna kyu important hai?

options.A: Taki client jaldi give up kar de.
options.B: Taki client motivated rahe aur success achieve kar sake.
options.C: Taki advisor ko kam mehnat karni pade.
options.D: Taki client ko pata na chale ki kitna weight loss karna hai.

questions.explanation: Realistic goals set karne se client motivated rehta hai aur unhe achievable targets milte hain, jisse long-term success ki sambhavna badhti hai.

questions.question: Weight management mein 'mindful eating' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Apne khane par dhyan dena, uske taste aur texture ko mehsoos karna.
options.D: Bhookh na hone par bhi khana.

questions.explanation: Mindful eating mein apne khane par poora dhyan dena, signals ko samajhna aur overeating se bachna shamil hai.

questions.question: Ek client jo weight loss karna chahta hai, uske liye sabse pehla step kya hona chahiye?

options.A: Immediately ek extreme diet shuru karna.
options.B: Apne current lifestyle aur eating habits ka assessment karna.

questions.explanation: Sabse pehla step client ke current lifestyle, eating habits aur physical activity level ka detailed assessment karna hai, taki ek personalized aur effective plan banaya ja sake.

questions.question: Weight management mein 'plateau' phase kya hai?

options.A: Jab weight loss bahut tezi se hota hai.
options.B: Jab weight loss ruk jata hai, despite efforts.
options.D: Jab sirf muscle mass badhta hai.

questions.explanation: Plateau phase tab hota hai jab weight loss ruk jata hai, bhale hi client apni diet aur exercise plan ko follow kar raha ho. Iske liye plan mein adjustments ki zaroorat hoti hai.

questions.question: Human body mein kitni bones hoti hain?
questions.explanation: Adult human body mein 206 bones hoti hain.

questions.question: Muscles ka primary function kya hai?

options.B: Movement provide karna.

questions.explanation: Muscles ka primary function body ko movement provide karna hai.

questions.question: Heart ka primary function kya hai?

options.B: Blood ko body mein pump karna.

questions.explanation: Heart ka main kaam blood ko poore body mein pump karna hai, jisse oxygen aur nutrients cells tak pahunchte hain.

questions.question: Lungs ka primary function kya hai?

options.B: Oxygen lena aur carbon dioxide chhodna.

questions.explanation: Lungs ka primary function respiration hai, jismein oxygen ko absorb karna aur carbon dioxide ko release karna shamil hai.

questions.question: Digestive system ka main kaam kya hai?

options.B: Food ko break down karke nutrients absorb karna.

questions.explanation: Digestive system food ko break down karta hai aur usse nutrients absorb karta hai, jo body ki energy aur growth ke liye zaroori hain.

questions.question: Basal Metabolic Rate (BMR) kya hai?

options.A: Exercise karte waqt burn ki gayi calories.
options.B: Resting position mein body dwara burn ki gayi minimum calories.
options.C: Food digest karne mein burn ki gayi calories.

questions.explanation: BMR woh minimum calories hain jo body ko resting position mein apne basic functions (jaise breathing, circulation) ko maintain karne ke liye chahiye hoti hain.

questions.question: Aerobic exercise primarily kis system par work karti hai?

options.B: Skeletal system

questions.explanation: Aerobic exercise (jaise running, swimming) heart aur lungs ko strengthen karti hai, jisse cardiovascular system improve hota hai.

questions.question: Anaerobic exercise ka example kya hai?

options.B: Swimming

questions.explanation: Anaerobic exercise mein short bursts ki intense activity shamil hoti hai, jaise weightlifting ya sprinting, jahan body ko oxygen ki zaroorat se zyada energy ki demand hoti hai.

questions.question: Hormone insulin ka main function kya hai?

options.B: Blood sugar levels regulate karna.

questions.explanation: Insulin ek hormone hai jo pancreas dwara produce hota hai aur blood sugar levels ko regulate karne mein crucial role play karta hai.

questions.question: Kya muscles fat mein convert ho sakti hain?

options.B: Nahi, muscles aur fat do alag tissues hain.
options.D: Jab body mein protein ki kami ho.

questions.explanation: Muscles aur fat do alag tissues hain. Muscles fat mein convert nahi ho sakti, lekin muscle loss aur fat gain ek saath ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Water body ke liye kyu essential hai?

options.B: Nutrient transport, temperature regulation aur waste removal ke liye.

questions.explanation: Water body ke har function ke liye crucial hai, jismein nutrient transport, body temperature regulation aur waste removal shamil hain.

questions.question: Endocrine system ka main function kya hai?

options.B: Hormones produce aur regulate karna.

questions.explanation: Endocrine system glands aur hormones ka network hai jo body ke functions ko regulate karta hai, jaise metabolism, growth aur mood.

questions.question: Bone density maintain karne ke liye kaun sa nutrient important hai?

options.B: Vitamin C

questions.explanation: Calcium bones aur teeth ke liye essential hai, aur bone density maintain karne mein crucial role play karta hai.

questions.question: Glycogen kya hai aur kahan store hota hai?

options.A: Fat ka ek form, jo adipose tissue mein store hota hai.
options.B: Glucose ka stored form, jo liver aur muscles mein store hota hai.
options.C: Protein ka ek type, jo blood mein paya jata hai.
options.D: Ek vitamin, jo bones ke liye important hai.

questions.explanation: Glycogen glucose ka stored form hai, jo body energy ke liye use karti hai. Ye primarily liver aur muscles mein store hota hai.

questions.question: Respiratory system ka kaun sa part gas exchange ke liye responsible hai?

options.B: Bronchi

questions.explanation: Alveoli, jo lungs mein chhote air sacs hote hain, wahi par oxygen aur carbon dioxide ka actual gas exchange hota hai.

questions.question: Body mein fat primarily kis form mein store hota hai?

options.B: Amino acids

questions.explanation: Body mein fat cells (adipocytes) mein triglycerides ke roop mein store hota hai.

questions.question: Hormone Cortisol ka body par kya effect hota hai?

options.B: Stress response ko regulate karta hai aur fat storage ko promote kar sakta hai.

questions.explanation: Cortisol ek stress hormone hai jo stress response ko regulate karta hai. High levels prolonged stress mein fat storage, especially abdominal fat, ko promote kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Macronutrients kya hain?

options.B: Carbohydrates, Proteins aur Fats

questions.explanation: Macronutrients woh nutrients hain jo body ko badi matra mein chahiye hote hain energy aur growth ke liye, jaise Carbohydrates, Proteins aur Fats.

questions.question: 1 gram protein mein kitni calories hoti hain?

options.B: 9 calories

questions.explanation: 1 gram protein mein lagbhag 4 calories hoti hain.

questions.question: 1 gram fat mein kitni calories hoti hain?

options.B: 9 calories

questions.explanation: 1 gram fat mein lagbhag 9 calories hoti hain, jo carbohydrates aur proteins se zyada hain.

questions.question: Fiber rich food items ke examples kya hain?

options.B: Fruits, vegetables, whole grains

questions.explanation: Fruits, vegetables aur whole grains fiber ke acche sources hain, jo digestion aur satiety ke liye important hai.

questions.question: Protein ka primary function kya hai body mein?

options.B: Muscles aur tissues ko build aur repair karna.

questions.explanation: Protein body mein muscles, tissues, enzymes aur hormones ko build aur repair karne ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Healthy fats ke examples kya hain?

options.B: Avocado, nuts, olive oil

questions.explanation: Avocado, nuts, seeds aur olive oil jaise sources se milne wale unsaturated fats ko healthy fats mana jata hai, jo heart health ke liye acche hain.

questions.question: Simple carbohydrates aur complex carbohydrates mein kya antar hai?

options.A: Simple carbs mein fiber zyada hota hai.
options.B: Complex carbs jaldi digest hote hain.
options.C: Simple carbs jaldi energy dete hain, complex carbs dheere-dheere energy release karte hain.

questions.explanation: Simple carbs (jaise sugar) jaldi digest hokar instant energy dete hain, jabki complex carbs (jaise whole grains) dheere-dheere digest hokar sustained energy dete hain.

questions.question: Weight loss ke liye kaun sa macronutrient intake high rakhna beneficial ho sakta hai?

options.B: Saturated Fat

questions.explanation: Protein intake high rakhne se satiety badhti hai, muscle mass maintain rehta hai aur thermic effect of food (TEF) bhi zyada hota hai, jo weight loss mein helpful hai.

questions.question: Vitamins aur Minerals ko collectively kya kehte hain?

options.B: Micronutrients

questions.explanation: Vitamins aur Minerals ko micronutrients kehte hain kyunki body ko inki kam matra mein zaroorat hoti hai, lekin ye body functions ke liye essential hain.

questions.question: Processed foods kyu avoid karne chahiye weight management ke liye?

options.B: Inmein aksar hidden sugars, unhealthy fats aur sodium high hota hai.
options.C: Ye taste mein acche nahi hote.
options.D: Inmein bahut zyada fiber hota hai.

questions.explanation: Processed foods mein aksar zyada calories, unhealthy fats, sugar aur sodium hota hai, jo weight gain aur health issues ko promote kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Balanced diet ki definition kya hai?

options.B: Sabhi macronutrients aur micronutrients ko sahi matra mein shamil karna.

questions.explanation: Ek balanced diet woh hai jo body ko uske functions ke liye zaroori sabhi essential nutrients (macronutrients aur micronutrients) sahi matra mein provide karti hai.

questions.question: Dairy products kaun se nutrient ka accha source hain?

options.B: Iron

questions.explanation: Dairy products jaise milk, cheese aur yogurt calcium aur Vitamin D ke acche sources hain, jo bone health ke liye important hain.

questions.question: Glycemic Index (GI) kya measure karta hai?

options.B: Food kitni jaldi blood sugar level ko badhata hai.

questions.explanation: Glycemic Index (GI) measure karta hai ki ek particular food item blood sugar level ko kitni jaldi aur kitna badhata hai.

questions.question: Essential amino acids kya hote hain?

options.A: Jo body khud bana sakti hai.
options.B: Jo body khud nahi bana sakti aur diet se lene padte hain.
options.C: Jo sirf plant-based foods mein milte hain.
options.D: Jo sirf animal-based foods mein milte hain.

questions.explanation: Essential amino acids woh hain jo body khud synthesize nahi kar sakti, isliye unhe diet ke through lena zaroori hai.

questions.question: Ek client ko healthy snacking ke liye kya suggest karoge?

options.B: Fruits, nuts, yogurt ya vegetable sticks.

questions.explanation: Healthy snacks mein fruits, nuts, yogurt, aur vegetables shamil hote hain jo nutrients provide karte hain aur unhealthy cravings ko control karte hain.

questions.question: Vitamin D ka primary source kya hai?

options.B: Sunlight exposure

questions.explanation: Sunlight exposure Vitamin D ka sabse important aur natural source hai, jo bone health aur immunity ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Nutrient density ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Food mein uski caloric value ke hisaab se kitne nutrients hain.

questions.explanation: Nutrient density ka matlab hai ki ek food item mein uski caloric value ke comparison mein kitne nutrients (vitamins, minerals, fiber) hain. High nutrient density wale foods weight management ke liye acche hote hain.

questions.question: Warm-up exercise kyu important hai workout se pehle?

options.B: Muscles ko prepare karne aur injury risk kam karne ke liye.
options.C: Workout ko lamba karne ke liye.
options.D: Body temperature kam karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Warm-up muscles ko workout ke liye prepare karta hai, blood flow badhata hai aur injury ke risk ko kam karta hai.

questions.question: Cool-down exercise ka kya purpose hai?

options.A: Heart rate ko abruptly stop karna.
options.B: Body ko gradually normal state mein wapas lana.
options.D: Fat loss ko speed up karna.

questions.explanation: Cool-down exercise heart rate aur breathing ko dheere-dheere normal karti hai, muscles ko relax karti hai aur soreness kam karti hai.

questions.question: Cardio exercise ka example kya hai?

options.B: Sprinting

questions.explanation: Jogging ek aerobic ya cardio exercise hai jo heart rate ko badhati hai aur cardiovascular health ko improve karti hai.

questions.question: Strength training ka primary benefit kya hai?

options.B: Muscle mass badhana aur bone density improve karna.
options.D: Fat loss par koi effect nahi.

questions.explanation: Strength training muscle mass badhati hai, jo metabolism ko boost karta hai, aur bone density ko bhi improve karti hai.

questions.question: FITTA principle mein 'I' kya represent karta hai?

options.B: Interval

questions.explanation: FITTA principle (Frequency, Intensity, Time, Type, Adherence) exercise ki planning ke liye use hota hai. 'I' Intensity ko refer karta hai.

questions.question: HIIT ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Heavy Impact Intensive Training

questions.explanation: HIIT ka full form High-Intensity Interval Training hai, jismein short bursts ki intense exercise aur brief recovery periods shamil hote hain.

questions.question: Flexibility training kyu important hai?

options.A: Sirf muscles build karne ke liye.
options.B: Range of motion improve karne aur injury risk kam karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Flexibility training (jaise stretching) joints ki range of motion ko improve karti hai aur muscles ki elasticity badhati hai, jisse injury ka risk kam hota hai.

questions.question: Ek beginner ke liye exercise plan shuru karte waqt kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Pehle din se hi bahut intense workout karna.
options.B: Dheere-dheere start karna aur gradually intensity badhana.
options.C: Sirf ek hi type ki exercise karna.
options.D: Kisi bhi doctor se consult na karna.

questions.explanation: Beginners ko dheere-dheere start karna chahiye aur apni body ko adapt hone ka time dena chahiye, taki injury se bacha ja sake aur consistency bani rahe.

questions.question: Workout se pehle kya khana chahiye?

options.B: Light meal jismein complex carbs aur thoda protein ho.

questions.explanation: Workout se pehle light meal jismein complex carbs (energy ke liye) aur thoda protein ho, performance ko improve karta hai. Heavy ya greasy food avoid karna chahiye.

questions.question: Workout ke baad recovery ke liye kya important hai?

options.B: Protein aur carbohydrates ka intake, aur adequate rest.

questions.explanation: Workout ke baad muscles ko repair aur replenish karne ke liye protein aur carbohydrates ka intake aur adequate rest bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Compound exercises kya hoti hain?

options.A: Jo sirf ek muscle group par focus karti hain.
options.B: Jo kai muscle groups aur joints ko ek saath involve karti hain.
options.C: Jo sirf bodyweight se ki jaati hain.
options.D: Jo sirf cardio ke liye hoti hain.

questions.explanation: Compound exercises (jaise squats, deadlifts) ek hi movement mein kai muscle groups aur joints ko involve karti hain, jo zyada calories burn karti hain aur functional strength badhati hain.

questions.question: Isometric exercises ka example kya hai?

options.B: Bicep curls

questions.explanation: Isometric exercises mein muscles contract hoti hain lekin joint angle change nahi hota, jaise plank ya wall sit.

questions.question: Progressive overload principle ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Har workout mein ek hi weight use karna.
options.B: Workout ko dheere-dheere zyada challenging banana.
options.D: Ek hi exercise ko baar-baar repeat karna.

questions.explanation: Progressive overload ka matlab hai ki muscles ko grow karne aur strong banane ke liye unpar dheere-dheere zyada stress dalna, jaise weight badhana ya reps badhana.

questions.question: Workout plan mein variety kyu important hai?

options.A: Taki muscles ko shock na lage.
options.B: Taki body adapt na ho aur motivation bani rahe.
options.C: Taki sirf ek hi muscle group train ho.
options.D: Taki workout jaldi khatam ho jaye.

questions.explanation: Workout plan mein variety rakhne se body ko adapt hone se roka ja sakta hai, alag-alag muscle groups train hote hain aur boredom se bachne mein help milti hai, jisse consistency bani rehti hai.

questions.question: Bodyweight exercises ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Koi equipment nahi chahiye aur functional strength badhti hai.
options.C: Bahut zyada injury risk hota hai.
options.D: Sirf calories burn karti hain, muscles nahi banati.

questions.explanation: Bodyweight exercises bina kisi equipment ke ki ja sakti hain, functional strength aur stability badhati hain, aur sabhi fitness levels ke liye suitable hain.

questions.question: Cardio exercises se kya benefits milte hain?

options.B: Heart health improve hoti hai, endurance badhti hai aur calories burn hoti hain.

questions.explanation: Cardio exercises cardiovascular health ko improve karti hain, lung capacity badhati hain, endurance develop karti hain aur calorie expenditure badhati hain.

questions.question: Over-training ke signs kya ho sakte hain?

options.A: Increased energy levels aur better sleep.
options.B: Constant fatigue, decreased performance aur mood swings.

questions.explanation: Over-training ke signs mein constant fatigue, workout performance mein kami, mood swings, sleep disturbances aur increased injury risk shamil hain.

questions.question: Client assessment mein sabse pehla step kya hai?

options.B: Medical history aur lifestyle information collect karna.

questions.explanation: Sabse pehle client ki complete medical history, lifestyle, diet habits aur fitness level ki information collect karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: PAR-Q form kyu use kiya jata hai?

options.A: Client ki financial history जानने के लिए।
options.B: Client ki physical activity readiness assess karne ke liye aur potential health risks identify karne ke liye.
options.C: Client ki height aur weight measure karne ke liye.
options.D: Client ko motivational quotes dene ke liye।

questions.explanation: PAR-Q (Physical Activity Readiness Questionnaire) client ki physical activity ke liye readiness ko assess karta hai aur identify karta hai ki unhe doctor se consult karne ki zaroorat hai ya nahi.

questions.question: SMART goals ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, Time-bound.

questions.explanation: SMART goals Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant aur Time-bound hone chahiye, jo goal setting ko effective banata hai.

questions.question: Client ki motivation maintain karne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Unke progress ko acknowledge karna, support provide karna aur realistic expectations set karna.
options.C: Unhe har din ek hi workout karwana.

questions.explanation: Client ki motivation maintain karne ke liye unke efforts aur progress ko recognize karna, positive reinforcement dena aur ek supportive environment create karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Client ko diet plan dete waqt kis baat ka dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Client ki preferences, cultural background aur dietary restrictions ko consider karna.
options.C: Ek hi diet plan sabhi clients ko dena.
options.D: Unhe bahut kam khane ke liye force karna.

questions.explanation: Personalized diet plan banate waqt client ki preferences, cultural background, allergies aur dietary restrictions ko dhyan mein rakhna chahiye taki plan sustainable aur enjoyable ho.

questions.question: Active listening skills kyu important hain ek advisor ke liye?

options.A: Taki client jaldi se apni baat khatam kar de.
options.B: Client ki concerns, goals aur challenges ko effectively samajhne ke liye.
options.C: Sirf information collect karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Active listening se advisor client ki needs aur concerns ko sahi tareeke se samajh pata hai, jisse better guidance aur support provide kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Client ki body measurements lena kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf unhe demotivate karne ke liye.
options.B: Progress track karne aur body composition changes ko monitor karne ke liye.
options.C: Unki height check karne ke liye.
options.D: Unhe gym equipment decide karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Body measurements (jaise waist circumference, body fat percentage) progress ko quantify karne aur weight loss ke saath-saath body composition mein hone wale changes ko track karne mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Client ko behavior change ke liye kaise motivate kar sakte hain?

options.B: Unke saath collaborate karke, small, achievable steps suggest karke aur self-efficacy build karke.

questions.explanation: Behavior change ke liye motivational interviewing techniques, collaboration, small victories aur self-efficacy (client ka apni abilities par vishwas) build karna bahut effective hota hai.

questions.question: Ek client jo emotional eating karta hai, uske liye kya advice denge?

options.A: Sirf usse khana band karne ko bolenge.
options.B: Emotional triggers identify karne aur coping mechanisms develop karne mein help karenge.
options.C: Usse aur zyada khane ko bolenge.

questions.explanation: Emotional eating ek complex issue hai. Advisor ko client ko emotional triggers ko pehchanne aur healthier coping mechanisms (jaise exercise, meditation) develop karne mein guide karna chahiye.

questions.question: Client ki long-term adherence ke liye kya important hai?

options.A: Unhe ek strict aur inflexible plan dena.
options.B: Plan ko flexible aur enjoyable banana, aur client ko ownership dena.
options.C: Unhe har hafte naya plan dena.

questions.explanation: Long-term adherence ke liye plan ka flexible hona, client ki needs ke according adjust hona aur client ko apne plan mein ownership feel karana bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Initial consultation mein kya discuss karna chahiye?

options.B: Client ke health goals, past experiences, challenges aur expectations.
options.C: Apne personal achievements ke bare mein.

questions.explanation: Initial consultation mein client ke goals, health history, past fitness experiences, challenges aur expectations ko discuss karna zaroori hai taki ek clear understanding ban sake.

questions.question: Client ke liye ek realistic timeline set karna kyu important hai?

options.A: Taki client ko lagatar pressure mein rakha ja sake.
options.B: Taki client ko demotivate kiya ja sake.
options.C: Taki client ko achievable targets milen aur woh frustrated na ho.
options.D: Taki advisor ko jaldi results dikhane paden.

questions.explanation: Realistic timeline client ko achievable targets deta hai, frustration ko kam karta hai aur long-term consistency ko promote karta hai.

questions.question: Client ko self-monitoring ke liye kya encourage kar sakte hain?

options.B: Food diary maintain karna, workout log rakhna aur regularly progress track karna.
options.D: Apne weight ko har ghante check karna.

questions.explanation: Self-monitoring tools jaise food diaries aur workout logs client ko apni progress track karne aur apni habits ke baare mein awareness badhane mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Client ko setbacks se deal karne mein kaise help karenge?

options.A: Unhe failures ke liye blame karke.
options.B: Unhe re-evaluate karne aur plan adjust karne mein help karke.
options.C: Unhe give up karne ko bolkar.

questions.explanation: Setbacks normal hain. Advisor ko client ko setbacks se seekhne, plan ko re-evaluate karne aur zarurat padne par adjust karne mein support karna chahiye.

questions.question: Client education ka kya role hai?

options.B: Unhe nutrition aur fitness ke basic principles sikhana taki woh informed decisions le saken.
options.C: Unhe sirf supplements ke baare mein batana.
options.D: Unhe apne decisions khud lene se rokna.

questions.explanation: Client education unhe nutrition aur fitness ke baare mein knowledge provide karti hai, jisse woh informed decisions le sakte hain aur long-term healthy habits develop kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Client ko accountability maintain karne ke liye kya suggest kar sakte hain?

options.B: Regular check-ins, progress tracking aur ek support system banana.
options.D: Kahi bhi apni progress record na karna.

questions.explanation: Accountability ke liye regular check-ins with advisor, progress tracking aur ek support system (jaise family, friends) bahut helpful hote hain.

questions.question: Pregnant client ke liye exercise plan banate waqt kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Doctor ki permission lena aur low-impact exercises suggest karna.
options.C: Unhe bilkul exercise na karne ki salah dena.

questions.explanation: Pregnant clients ke liye doctor ki permission lena aur low-impact, moderate intensity exercises recommend karna zaroori hai, jaise walking, swimming ya prenatal yoga.

questions.question: Senior citizens ke liye exercise plan mein kya shamil hona chahiye?

options.B: Balance, flexibility, strength aur low-impact cardio exercises.

questions.explanation: Senior citizens ke liye balance, flexibility, strength aur low-impact cardio exercises (jaise walking, tai chi) unki functional independence aur quality of life maintain karne mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Diabetes wale client ko diet advice dete waqt kya important hai?

options.A: Unhe sirf sugary foods khane ko bolna.
options.B: Consistent meal timings, complex carbs aur sugar intake control karna.
options.C: Unhe bahut zyada processed foods khane ko bolna.
options.D: Unhe koi bhi diet restriction na dena.

questions.explanation: Diabetes wale clients ke liye consistent meal timings, complex carbohydrates ka sevan, aur sugar intake ko control karna blood sugar management ke liye crucial hai. Doctor/Dietitian se consult karna bhi zaroori hai.

questions.question: Ek fitness advisor ko kab client ko medical professional ke paas refer karna chahiye?

options.A: Jab client ko koi health concern na ho.
options.B: Jab client ko koi pre-existing medical condition ho ya new symptoms develop hon.

questions.explanation: Advisor ko client ko medical professional ke paas refer karna chahiye jab unhe koi pre-existing medical condition ho, ya exercise ke dauran koi naye ya alarming symptoms develop hon.

questions.question: Professional ethics mein 'confidentiality' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Client ki information sabhi ke saath share karna.
options.B: Client ki personal aur health information ko private rakhna.
options.C: Sirf physical health information ko private rakhna.
options.D: Client ki information ko social media par post karna.

questions.explanation: Confidentiality ka matlab hai client ki personal aur health information ko private aur secure rakhna, jo ek ethical responsibility hai.

questions.question: Ek advisor ko 'scope of practice' ke andar rehna kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Taki woh zyada clients ko handle kar saken.
options.B: Taki woh legal aur ethical boundaries ko maintain kar saken aur clients ko harm na pahunche.
options.C: Taki woh sirf easy cases handle kar saken.
options.D: Taki woh medical advice de saken.

questions.explanation: Scope of practice ke andar rehna zaroori hai taki advisor apni expertise ki limits ko samjhe, unauthorized medical advice na de aur legal & ethical standards ko maintain kare.

questions.question: Client ko supplements recommend karte waqt kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Sirf scientifically proven aur safe supplements recommend karna, aur doctor se consult karna.

questions.explanation: Supplements sirf tab recommend karne chahiye jab unki zaroorat ho, woh scientifically backed hon, aur client ke doctor se consult kiya gaya ho. Supplements balanced diet aur exercise ka substitute nahi hain.

questions.question: Children aur adolescents ke liye fitness plan banate waqt kya considerations honi chahiye?

options.A: Unhe adult ki tarah same intense workouts karwana.
options.B: Fun-based, age-appropriate activities aur safe environment provide karna.
options.C: Unhe sirf diet par focus karwana.
options.D: Unhe bilkul bhi physical activity na karwane dena.

questions.explanation: Children aur adolescents ke liye fitness plan fun-based, age-appropriate, aur safe hona chahiye, jismein play, sports aur moderate physical activity shamil ho.

questions.question: Client ki 'informed consent' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Client ko bina bataye unke liye decisions lena.
options.B: Client ko program ke risks, benefits aur alternatives ke baare mein poori jankari dena aur unki permission lena.
options.D: Client ko program ke baare mein kuch na batana.

questions.explanation: Informed consent ka matlab hai client ko program ke baare mein saari zaroori jankari (risks, benefits, alternatives) dena aur unki swikriti lena, taaki woh informed decision le saken.

questions.question: Body image issues wale client ko kaise approach karna chahiye?

options.B: Positive self-talk encourage karna, health par focus karna, aur support services refer karna.
options.D: Unhe aur zyada weight loss karne ko bolna.

questions.explanation: Body image issues wale clients ko empathetic tareeke se approach karna chahiye, health aur well-being par focus karna, aur zaroorat padne par mental health professional ko refer karna chahiye.

questions.question: Ek advisor ko apni knowledge aur skills ko kaise update karte rehna chahiye?

options.B: Continuous education, workshops aur certifications ke through.
options.D: Sirf social media se information collect karke.

questions.explanation: Professional growth ke liye advisors ko continuous education, workshops, seminars aur certifications ke through apni knowledge aur skills ko update karte rehna chahiye.

questions.question: Client ki safety ke liye exercise session mein kya precautions leni chahiye?

options.A: Equipment ko bina check kiye use karna.
options.B: Proper form aur technique sikhana, environment safe rakhna aur client ki limits ko respect karna.
options.C: Client ko apni limits se aage badhne ke liye force karna.

questions.explanation: Client ki safety ke liye proper form aur technique sikhana, workout area ko safe rakhna, aur client ki physical limits ko samajhna aur respect karna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Special populations (e.g., heart patients) ke liye exercise plan banate waqt kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Unhe kisi bhi tarah ki exercise na karwane dena.
options.B: Doctor ki clearance aur specific guidelines ko follow karna.
options.D: Unki medical history ko ignore karna.

questions.explanation: Special populations ke liye exercise plan banate waqt doctor ki clearance, unki medical history aur specific conditions ke liye guidelines ko follow karna crucial hai.

questions.question: Ethical dilemma ki situation mein ek advisor ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Apne personal judgment par depend karna.
options.B: Professional guidelines, codes of ethics ko consult karna aur senior colleagues se advice lena.
options.D: Jaldi se koi bhi decision lena.

questions.explanation: Ethical dilemma ki situation mein advisor ko professional guidelines, codes of ethics ko consult karna, aur zaroorat padne par experienced colleagues ya mentor se advice lena chahiye.

questions.question: Weight management mein stress management ka kya role hai?

options.B: Stress se emotional eating aur fat storage badh sakta hai, isliye stress management important hai.
options.C: Stress sirf mood ko affect karta hai.
options.D: Stress se weight loss speed up hota hai.

questions.explanation: Stress cortisol levels ko badha sakta hai, jo emotional eating aur abdominal fat storage ko promote kar sakta hai. Isliye effective stress management weight management ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Body shaming ek fitness advisor ke liye acceptable hai?

options.B: Nahi, ye unprofessional aur unethical hai.
options.C: Sirf tab jab client ko motivate karna ho.

questions.explanation: Body shaming unprofessional, unethical aur harmful hai. Ek advisor ko hamesha positive, supportive aur respectful approach rakhna chahiye.
